ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand associated with the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Jackets, Shirts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was last updated */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., formal, casual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product associated with the size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "jacket_length" REAL /* Length of the jacket in inches */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "stomach" REAL /* Stomach measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level for reordering stock */,
  "low_stock_alert" INTEGER /* Flag for sending low stock alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the size chart */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Jackets, Pants) */,
  "size_reference" TEXT /* Reference for sizes (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "size_measurements" TEXT /* JSON object containing various size measurements */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of size chart (e.g., standard, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being returned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the return */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., wrong size, defective) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution description for the return (e.g., refund, exchange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, customer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., viewed product, updated size) */,
  "feature_accessed" TEXT /* Feature or resource accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product related to the feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text comment from the user about the size */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being tracked */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales for that size */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the sales count was recorded */,
  "sales_amount" TEXT /* Total sales amount for that size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text comment from the user about the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
